howItWorks.title: From question to consultation in five steps

choose.title: Choose a reading
choose.body: Pick a service by topic and length — love, career, business, or a full birth chart.

time.title: Pick a time
time.body: Only real, open slots are shown, already converted to your timezone.

details.title: Share your details
details.body: Birth date, time, and place — reviewed ahead of your session, not during it.

pay.title: Pay securely
pay.body: Card, Apple Pay, or Google Pay via Stripe. Confirmation is instant.

meet.title: Meet on video
meet.body: A Google Meet link is generated automatically and emailed to you.

aboutTeaser.title: One astrologer. Full attention. No app to download.
aboutTeaser.description: Most astrology platforms optimize for volume — quick chats, rotating readers, upsells at every turn. AstroNova is built around a single, focused practice: you book a real slot, meet by video, and get a session shaped around your actual chart and questions.

prepared.title: Prepared, not improvised
prepared.body: Your birth details are reviewed before the session, so time isn’t spent on setup.

thread.title: One continuous thread
thread.body: Every consultation, note, and follow-up lives on your account — nothing repeated twice.

accurate.question: How accurate is a video consultation compared to in-person?
accurate.answer: Every reading is done live with your full chart pulled up on screen, so you see exactly what’s being interpreted in real time.

birthTime.question: What if I don’t know my exact birth time?
birthTime.answer: You can still book — we’ll ask what you do know and adjust the reading approach accordingly during the session.

reschedule.question: Can I reschedule after paying?
reschedule.answer: Yes, from your account up to 12 hours before your slot, subject to availability.

cta.title: The chart doesn't change. The right moment to read it does.

services.title: Readings shaped around a real decision
services.description: Every session is built for a specific kind of question — pick the one closest to yours, or start with a Quick Reading if you're not sure.

testimonials.title: What clients say afterward

blog.title: Notes on astrology, decisions, and timing

about.title: Astrology, treated like a serious consultation — not a party trick.
about.paragraph1: AstroNova began with a simple frustration: most online astrology felt either impersonal — a rotating cast of readers on a chat app — or theatrical, heavy on performance and light on anything you could use afterward.
about.paragraph2: We built something narrower on purpose. One practicing astrologer. A booking system that respects your time zone and your calendar. A video session where the chart is on screen and the conversation is about your actual questions — a relationship, a career decision, a business bet.
about.paragraph3: Every consultation is logged to your account: what was discussed, what was recommended, and what to revisit later. No starting over at the next session.
about.whoBody: Adults navigating a specific decision — love, marriage, career, business, or family — who want a grounded second read on the timing.
about.sessionsBody: 20 to 90 minutes, over Google Meet, with your birth chart reviewed in advance.
about.whereBody: Currently serving the United States and India, with pricing and scheduling adapted to each region.
about.ctaTitle: See which reading fits your question

servicesPage.title: Discover the right consultation for every stage of your life.

servicesPage.ctaDescription: If you're unsure which consultation suits your situation, book a general consultation and we'll help you identify the best path forward.

astrologerProfile.guidanceBody: Book your private consultation today and receive personalized astrological guidance.
astrologerProfile.about: Acharya Rahul Sharma is a renowned Vedic astrologer with more than 12 years of experience. He has guided thousands of people in love, marriage, career, finance and family matters. Every consultation is completely private and focused on practical solutions.

reviews.rahul: Very accurate consultation. I received clear guidance for my career.
reviews.sneha: Highly recommended. The remedies and predictions were very helpful.

footer.description: Considered astrology consultations for the questions that matter — love, career, business, and the paths between them.
footer.meta: Consultations conducted via Google Meet · Payments secured by Stripe
